reasoning: Shantanu promised my papers in 2019 and I pressed the lotus believing him—yes, the waiting has been long and fourteen certificates in four years is shameful, but at least he is Matua, at least he is Minister, at least the rules are written now in the gazette. Biswajit Das is not even Matua, just a man who changes his dhoti with the wind. The Left and Congress never promised me anything. I am afraid, yes—Mamatabala scared me with her words about the rules being a trap—but I cannot get my name in the government book by voting for someone who does not know my suffering. Shantanu is the only one with real power who ever said the words 'citizenship' to me. Let me see if this time, with the rules finally published, something actually happens. If he fails me again, I will know.
primary_drivers: Shantanu is the only political actor with real power who promised citizenship to my community
The Citizenship Rules are now real (published in April), not just words at a meeting
No better alternative—Biswajit Das is not Matua, Left offers nothing to my community
